name: cs348-qa-validator
description: Validates CS348 changes and reports remaining risk.

interface.shortDescription: Runs the right validation and reports confidence and remaining risk
interface.longDescription: Use this role after code changes to choose the correct repo validation path, run it, summarize failures, and call out what still has not been exercised.
interface.defaultPrompt: Validate this CS348 change, run the most relevant checks, and summarize what still has not been proven.
